class.name: GIFPlayer
class.brief_description: Control node for animated GIF playback.
class.description: GIFPlayer is a [Control] node that displays and plays animated GIFs. Provides playback controls, multiple play modes, and display options similar to [TextureRect]. Automatically advances frames based on the GIF's delay timing.

method.name: get_expand_mode
method.description: Returns the current expand mode.

method.name: get_frame
method.description: Returns the currently displayed frame index.

method.name: get_frame_count
method.description: Returns the total number of frames in the loaded GIF.

method.name: get_gif
method.description: Returns the currently loaded [GIFTexture].

method.name: get_loop_count
method.description: Returns the loop count setting. -1 uses the GIF's default loop count.

method.name: get_play_mode
method.description: Returns the current play mode.

method.name: get_speed_scale
method.description: Returns the current playback speed multiplier.

method.name: get_stretch_mode
method.description: Returns the current stretch mode.

method.name: is_flipped_h
method.description: Returns true if the GIF is horizontally flipped.

method.name: is_flipped_v
method.description: Returns true if the GIF is vertically flipped.

method.name: is_paused
method.description: Returns true if playback is paused.

method.name: is_playing
method.description: Returns true if currently playing (not stopped).

method.name: play
method.description: Starts playback from the beginning. Resets the frame position and loop counter.

method.name: set_expand_mode
method.description: Sets how the control size relates to the GIF dimensions.

method.name: set_flip_h
method.description: Enables or disables horizontal flipping of the GIF.

method.name: set_flip_v
method.description: Enables or disables vertical flipping of the GIF.

method.name: set_frame
method.description: Sets the current frame to display. Does not affect playback state.

method.name: set_gif
method.description: Sets the [GIFTexture] to display and play. Automatically resets playback to frame 0.

method.name: set_loop_count
method.description: Sets the number of times to loop the animation. 0 for infinite, -1 to use GIF default.

method.name: set_paused
method.description: Pauses or resumes playback. When paused, the current frame remains displayed.

method.name: set_play_mode
method.description: Sets the playback mode: forward, backward, ping-pong, or random.

method.name: set_playing
method.description: Sets whether playback is active. When set to false, acts like stop().

method.name: set_speed_scale
method.description: Sets the playback speed multiplier. 1.0 is normal speed, 2.0 is double speed, 0.5 is half speed.

method.name: set_stretch_mode
method.description: Sets how the GIF is scaled to fit the control rect.

method.name: stop
method.description: Stops playback and resets to the first frame.

constants.constant: Expand to fit height, ignoring width constraints.
Expand to fit width, ignoring height constraints.
Keep the original size, position at top-left.
Scale to fit while preserving aspect ratio. May leave empty space.
Scale to fit while preserving aspect ratio, centered.
Scale to cover the entire rect while preserving aspect ratio. May crop the image.
Keep the original size, centered in the rect.
Stretch to fill the entire control rect.
Tile the image to fill the rect.
